---
name: "🔴 Significant Change"
about: Propose a change that materially affects the SIG's direction, governance, or public commitments
title: "[Significant] "
labels: significant-decision
---

> **Review process reminder:** Significant changes require a minimum **10 business day** discussion period on this issue before a PR is raised, and **active approval from ≥3 maintainers representing ≥2 organisations**. Lazy consensus does not apply. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#significant-changes) for details.

## Summary

<!-- A brief description of the change you are proposing. -->

## Why is this significant?

<!-- Explain why this qualifies as a significant change. Examples: governance change, new/retired working group, new external partnership, structural reorganisation. -->

## Proposal

<!-- Describe the proposed change in detail. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches were considered and why were they ruled out? -->

## Impact

<!-- Who and what is affected by this change? -->

## Decision Record

<!-- To be completed once the discussion period closes and approval is obtained. -->

- **Decision:**
- **Approvals:** <!-- List maintainers and their organisations who actively approved -->
- **Date closed:**
